synopsis: A prequel to the Saki series, focusing on the childhoods of future professional mahjong players and their peers, among them Shino Shiratsuki, a young girl with an affinity for the 1-sou who is seeking out her missing mother.

title: Nyuuyoku Yankees
synopsis: Tatsuya Matsui and Taiga Kuroda are two people who get into fights while exploring various places… but actually they are just looking for public bathhouses in search of the best soak!! (Source: Web Action, Japanese translated)

title: Hinmin, Seihitsu, Daifugou
synopsis: Shiragaki Seiya, a high school student and the daughter of a mangaka, is anxious to become financially independent so as to relieve the burden on her single mother. One day while on the way to school, she has an encounter with "The Spirit of the Chest, Aurelia de Medici," and thereafter finds herself thrown headfirst into a no-holds-barred otherworldly battle revolving around money.

titleRomaji: Kimi ni Koi wo Suru Nante, Arienai Hazu Datta
titleNative: 君に恋をするなんて、ありえないはずだった
synonyms: I was supposed to never fall in love with you
Ichiban Tookute, Chikai Aitsu.: Kimi ni Koi wo Suru nante, Arienai Hazu Datta
一番遠くて、近いあいつ。～君に恋をするなんて、ありえないはずだった～
synopsis: Yasutaka Iijima, a boy wearing glasses, sits in the corner of the classroom and wants nothing to do with Ema Kitaoka, a popular gal in the same class. However, after a chance meeting at the school camping trip, they started talking with each other, but only outside of school. They are both unsure of each other's "true feelings." (Source: Comic Howl, translated)

title: Kyou Kara Tsukaeru Isekai Renai Manual
titleRomaji: Kyou Kara Tsukaeru Isekai Renai Manual
titleNative: 今日から使える異世界恋愛マニュアル
synonyms: A Love Manual You Can Use From Today
synopsis: Just as Haruchika Isezaki was confessing to his first love, he is suddenly summoned to another world. His summoner, the goddess Clementine, gives him an unusual mission: to make seven girls, destined to become the mothers of the next generation of heroes, fall in love again. These girls have lost their ability to love due to a curse cast by the Demon Lord. In other words, Haruchika must convince them all to fall in love with him! To return to his world and hear the answer to his confession, Haruchika accepts this mission and sets out to save another world through love. Having mastered the art of romance through his study of female psychology, his journey to fulfill their first loves begins — a romantic tale about saving another world through the power of love! (Source: Nico Nico Seiga, translated)

title: Shakunetsu no Takkyuu Musume: Reburn!!
synopsis: Koyori is a new transfer student looking for excitement, and Agari is a girl who devotes herself to her sport. Their encounter will create a fiery whirlwind in the world of junior high table tennis! Will Koyori and her team be able to grab a ticket to the nationals at the Tokyo tournament? Hearts pounding! Love at full speed! The story about girls' youth, previous adapted into anime, has been rekindled! (Source: Takeshobo, translated) Note: A sequel to Shakunetsu no Takkyuu Musume , originally announced in a special chapter called Shakunetsu no Idol Musume on February 24th 2023.

title: Ringoku kara Kita Yome ga Kawaisugite Doushiyou.
titleRomaji: Ringoku kara Kita Yome ga Kawaisugite Doushiyou.
titleNative: 隣国から来た嫁が可愛すぎてどうしよう。
synonyms: My Wife from the Neighboring Country Is So Cute, I Don't Know What to Do!
鄰國來的新娘太可愛了該怎麼辦？
synopsis: With his brash personality and muscular physique, and his fierce presence fighting against his country's foes, Salyu is known as the “Winter Bear of Tidros." Until one day when he finds himself engaged to Citron, a young lady whose betrothal was broken off in a neighboring country! Starting with a kiss on the forehead, he fidgets awkwardly around this unfamiliar woman. Her smile makes his heart race, and glimpses of her cleavage leave him flustered. Salyu's mind runs wild with naughty thoughts, pushing his sanity to the brink! This chaotic, heart-pounding romantic fantasy comedy begins — with his inner thoughts coming through loud and clear! (Source: Comic Pash, translated)

title: Please Bully Me, Miss Villainess!
titleRomaji: Qing Qifu Wo Ba, Eyi Xiaojie!
synopsis: Yifang found herself transported into the body of a villainess in an otome game. As the villainess Yvonne, she was supposed to be hated by the readers, as she bullies the FMC and helps the main characters come together. But there seems to be something wrong with this game's main character Elsa! "Hey, I told you not to come so close!" "Oh Yvonne… so how would you like to bully me today..." (Source: Bilibili, translated)

(Source: Bilibili Comics)

title: Yuuyuu Jiteki.
synopsis: Chihiro Suzuki, a serious and reserved college boy, meets Miyu Washio, an older girl with an incredibly positive attitude, while working at a convenience store near his new home. “Let’s make some happy memories right now!” Her unpredictable ideas for “fun” — and her wholehearted enjoyment of the moment — gradually transforms his dull and uneventful daily life. From their slightly offbeat conversations, an unexpected new chapter in their lives begins. This is a sweet and fresh coming-of-age romantic comedy that starts with “friendship”! (Source: NicoNico Seiga, translated)

title: Ryuu to Ayumu Nariagari Boukensha-dou: Youzumi to shite S-Rank Party kara Tsuihou Sareta Kaifuku Majutsushi, Suterareta Saki de Saikyou no Shinryuu wo Fukkatsu Saseteshimau

titleNative: 竜と歩む成り上がり冒険者道 ~用済みとしてSランクパーティから追放された回復魔術師、捨てられた先で最強の神竜を復活させてしまう~
synopsis: Dion, a healer, was thrown into the deepest part of a dungeon in a plot by his fellow party member. As he was facing certain death, he found a wounded dragon there. Dion healed the dragon with the last of his strength, and it turned out that it's a divine dragon named Eldora. Now that Eldora has regained her power, she will join Dion the exiled healer on a journey together as adventurers. Meanwhile, Yuki, the leader of the party that ditched Dion, was searching for him alone....... (Source: Bunkasha, translated)

title: This Alluring Dark Elf Has the Heart of a Middle-Aged Man!
titleRomaji: Watashi no Kokoro wa Ojisan de Aru
titleEnglish: This Alluring Dark Elf Has the Heart of a Middle-Aged Man!
titleNative: 私の心はおじさんである
synonyms: My Heart Is an Old Man
synopsis: With no friends, family, or romance to speak of, Haruka has lived his life just going through the motions—until the day he awakens in the body of a beautiful, and womanly, dark elf! Suddenly, a world beyond his wildest imagination awaits, and uncontainable excitement races through him. There's just one problem: He gave up on putting himself out there a long time ago and has no idea how to strike up a conversation with other people. Teenagers and (other) women are certainly no exception. But with a bottomless well of mana and a ridiculously tough body to boot, Haruka won't let any overthinking get in the way this time. Little by little, the dark elf works past his (her) fears and self-doubt, forging deep bonds with precious new friends and growing together with them. So begins a heartwarming story of an old man determined to make the most of this new fantastical lease on life! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Bocchi the Rock! Comic Anthology
titleNative: ぼっち・ざ・ろっく！アンソロジーコミック
synopsis: Hitori “Bocchi” Gotoh might find it hard to make friends, but that doesn't mean she's lacking in admirers! This rockin' anthology features a lineup of all-star guest authors ready to take the stage for the ultimate Bocchi the Rock! tribute concert! With a set list featuring hits such as “What If Bocchi Was Totally Ripped?,” “Kessoku Band Tours in Another World,” and “Hitori Gotoh vs the Police,” you'll discover new sides to your favorite characters you never even dreamed of! (Source: Yen Press) Volume 1 (2022/10/27) #Cover illustration: Chiba Sadoru #Illustrations: Matsuda Hikari, Uzaki Uso, Instant, Hoshi, Souma Hajime, HOJI, Iwawa 1. Bocchi the Rock!? (ぼっち・ざ・錠〈ロック〉!?) [Yuichi (ゆいち)] 2. Futari-chan no Okaimono Daisakusen! (ふたりちゃんのお買い物大作戦!) [Takeo Kyuujuu (タケオキュージュウ)] 3. Arigatou Guitar to Kinniku (ありがとうギターと筋肉) [Shirou Urayama] 4. Bocchi-chan no Otoshimono (ぼっちちゃんの落とし物) [Totsuno Takahide] 5. Bocchi-chan vs. Shokushitsu (ぼっちちゃん VS 職質) [Uraya Nagi] 6. Bocchi the Rally! (ぼっち・ざ・らりー!) [Uchino Maiko] 7. Toaru Classmate ga Mita Kessoku Band (とあるクラスメイトが見た結束バンド) [Cornflake (コーンフレーcu)] 8. Kessoku Band to Fushigi na Ehon (結束バンドと不思議な絵本) [Fuku Kitsune] 9. Go to the Burger Shop (GO TO BURGER SHO

title: Shuumatsu no Valkyrie Kinden: Kamigami no Apocalypse
titleRomaji: Shuumatsu no Valkyrie Kinden: Kamigami no Apocalypse
titleNative: 終末のワルキューレ禁伝 神々の黙示録
synonyms: Shuumatsu no Warukyuure: Kinden Kamigami no Apokaripusu
Record of Ragnarok: The Apocalypse of the Gods
synopsis: Zeus, supreme chairman of the Council of Valhalla, announces to the gods twelve of the thirteen fighters set to participate in Ragnarok--and is met with the dissenting voices of those who were not chosen. However, Zeus has foreseen this, and immediately declares the holding of another tournament to decide the final spot on the Ragnarok lineup, one which will break the taboo on gods fighting one another. Thus begins the "Revelation" of the untold side of Record of Ragnarok!
